import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react'; import { Users, Building2, TrendingUp, Activity, Calendar, DollarSign, UserCheck, Briefcase } from 'lucide-react'; import { format } from 'date-fns'; const StatCard = ({ title, value, icon: Icon, color, change }) => (

{title}

{value}

{change && (

= 0 ? 'text-green-600' : 'text-red-600'}`}> {change >= 0 ? '+' : ''}{change}% from last month

)}
); const RecentActivity = ({ title, items, type }) => { const getTypeColor = (active) => active ? 'status-active' : 'status-inactive'; return (

{title}

{items?.slice(0, 5).map((item) => (

{type === 'student' ? item.fullName : item.companyName}

{type === 'student' ? item.email : item.industry}

{item.active ? 'Active' : 'Inactive'}

{format(new Date(item.registrationDate), 'MMM dd, yyyy')}

))} {(!items || items.length === 0) && (

No recent {type}s

)}
); }; const Dashboard = () => { const [dashboardData, setDashboardData] = useState(null); const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true); useEffect(() => { // Mock data for demonstration - replace with actual API call const mockData = { totalStudents: 1247, activeStudents: 892, totalCompanies: 156, activeCompanies: 134, recentStudents: [ { id: 1, fullName: 'Rahul Kumar', email: 'rahul.kumar@college.edu', active: true, registrationDate: '2024-03-15' }, { id: 2, fullName: 'Priya Sharma', email: 'priya.sharma@college.edu', active: true, registrationDate: '2024-03-14' }, { id: 3, fullName: 'Amit Patel', email: 'amit.patel@college.edu', active: false, registrationDate: '2024-03-13' }, { id: 4, fullName: 'Neha Gupta', email: 'neha.gupta@college.edu', active: true, registrationDate: '2024-03-12' }, { id: 5, fullName: 'Vikram Singh', email: 'vikram.singh@college.edu', active: true, registrationDate: '2024-03-11' } ], recentCompanies: [ { id: 1, companyName: 'Tech Solutions Inc', industry: 'Software Development', active: true, registrationDate: '2024-03-15' }, { id: 2, companyName: 'Global Systems', industry: 'IT Services', active: true, registrationDate: '2024-03-14' }, { id: 3, companyName: 'Data Analytics Pro', industry: 'Data Science', active: false, registrationDate: '2024-03-13' }, { id: 4, companyName: 'CloudTech Industries', industry: 'Cloud Computing', active: true, registrationDate: '2024-03-12' }, { id: 5, companyName: 'CyberSec Solutions', industry: 'Cybersecurity', active: true, registrationDate: '2024-03-11' } ] }; setTimeout(() => { setDashboardData(mockData); setLoading(false); }, 1000); // Simulate loading }, []); if (loading) { return (

Loading dashboard...

); } console.log('Dashboard rendering with data:', dashboardData); const stats = [ { title: 'Total Students', value: dashboardData?.totalStudents || 0, icon: Users, color: 'bg-blue-500', change: 12 }, { title: 'Active Students', value: dashboardData?.activeStudents || 0, icon: UserCheck, color: 'bg-green-500', change: 8 }, { title: 'Total Companies', value: dashboardData?.totalCompanies || 0, icon: Building2, color: 'bg-purple-500', change: 15 }, { title: 'Active Companies', value: dashboardData?.activeCompanies || 0, icon: Briefcase, color: 'bg-orange-500', change: 10 } ]; return (
{/* Page Header */}

Dashboard

Welcome to the placement admin panel

{format(new Date(), 'EEEE, MMMM dd, yyyy')}
{/* Stats Grid */}
{stats.map((stat, index) => (

{stat.title}

{stat.value}

= 0 ? '#059669' : '#dc2626' }}> {stat.change >= 0 ? '+' : ''}{stat.change}% from last month

))}
{/* Quick Actions */}

Quick Actions

{/* Recent Activity */}

Recent Students

{dashboardData?.recentStudents?.slice(0, 5).map((student) => (

{student.fullName}

{student.email}

{student.active ? 'Active' : 'Inactive'}

{format(new Date(student.registrationDate), 'MMM dd, yyyy')}

))}

Recent Companies

{dashboardData?.recentCompanies?.slice(0, 5).map((company) => (

{company.companyName}

{company.industry}

{company.active ? 'Active' : 'Inactive'}

{format(new Date(company.registrationDate), 'MMM dd, yyyy')}

))}
{/* Additional Info Cards */}

Placement Rate

78.5%
+5.2% from last semester
980 out of 1,247 students placed

Avg. Package

₹8.2L
+12% from last year
Highest: ₹45L | Lowest: ₹3.5L

Active Drives

12
3 this week
850+ students registered
); }; export default Dashboard;
